rationale: Current subsample=0.8 is relatively high. Reducing to 0.75 introduces more stochasticity to combat overfitting on temporal test data (2023+), which is critical for temporal splits where distribution shift is likely. Recent experiments show diminishing returns on depth tuning (Exp 125-134 plateauing), suggesting regularization is the next lever. Lower subsample increases robustness to unseen temporal patterns.
